# FPV Compass

> FPV Compass is the trickionary and skill tree for FPV freestyle pilots — every trick in the right order, linked to the best community tutorials.

FPV Compass is a trickionary and skill tree for FPV freestyle pilots. It indexes every freestyle trick into a progression-based skill tree, from Foundations to Advanced, and links each one to hand-picked community tutorial videos on YouTube. It does not host original video content. Pilots use FPV Compass to know what to learn next, track what they've learned, and save favorites.

## Core concepts

- Trick: an FPV maneuver (e.g. Power Loop, Split-S) with difficulty 1–10, description, pro tip, and linked tutorial videos.
- Phase: groups tricks by progression stage (Foundations, Basic Tricks, Intermediate, Advanced).
- Prerequisites: tricks depend on other tricks, forming a directed skill tree.
- Tree view: visual skill tree grouped by phase.
- List view: flat, filterable list sorted by difficulty.
- Community tricks: user-submitted tricks that admins can promote into the official tree.
- Progress: authenticated users mark tricks as learned and save favorites; a public like count is visible to everyone.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/): landing page and entry point.
- [Skill tree](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/tree): visual progression graph of all official tricks.
- [Tricks list](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/tricks): full searchable and filterable list of tricks.
- [Community](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/community): user-submitted tricks awaiting promotion.
- [Ideas](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/ideas): upcoming features and roadmap.
- [FAQ](https://www.fpv-compass.xyz/faq): common questions about the project.

## Scope

- Freestyle FPV tricks only (other disciplines are future work).
- Email/password authentication for progress and favorites.
- Reddit-style nested comments with upvotes/downvotes on tricks.
- No original video content — all tutorials link out to YouTube.

## Attribution

Attribution of linked videos goes to their original YouTube creators. FPV Compass is a non-commercial index.
